subcodes.first_line: O Haydar, upon thee be My glory! A letter from his honor Sayyáḥ was written to 'Abdu'l-Ḥáḍir, wherein he declared his repudiation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حیدر علیک بهائی نامه‌ئی جناب سیاح بعبد حاضر نوشته و در آن نامه اظهار تبری
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
